ModMetaData.name: Better Equipment Reloading
ModMetaData.author: LongYinHaHa
ModMetaData.description:
Enhances the vanilla reloadable equipment experience in RimWorld. Your pawns will intelligently manage resources with inventory priority, auto resource finding, and right-click menu options for all vanilla reloadable equipment.
Core Features: - Inventory Priority: Pawns will first use resources from their own inventory - Auto Map Search: Automatically finds reachable resource stacks on the map - Multi-stack Hauling: Supports merging multiple resource stacks - Accurate Reloading: Pawn will only pick up the minimum amount of resources needed - World Map Gizmo Supported: Adds reload functionality to all reloadable gear with gizmo icons
Supported Equipment: - Smokepop Pack, Jump Pack, Tox Pack, and all other vanilla reloadable equipment
Requires Harmony.
---
为RimWorld原版消耗型装备提供增强的装填体验。小人现在可以智能管理资源、优先使用背包里的材料，并通过右键菜单轻松装填。
核心功能： - 库存优先：小人会优先使用自己背包里的资源 - 自动地图搜索：自动寻找地图上可达的资源堆 - 合并搬运：支持多堆资源合并搬运 - 精确装填：小人只会拿取当前最大装填次数所需的最少资源量 - 大地图Gizmo支持：为所有在世界地图上有Gizmo图标的可装填装备添加装填功能
支持装备： - 烟雾弹背包、跳跃背包、毒气背包等所有原版可装填装备
需要Harmony前置。
